name: find-src
description: Find source files by extension(s), excluding common non-source dirs (node_modules, target, git). Supports --count to tally files.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.description: File extension without dot (e.g. go, ts, rs). Comma-separated for multiple (ts,js).

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Use --sort to sort, --head=N to limit, --count to tally.

examples.expected: Sorted list of ts/js files excluding non-source dirs.

cost_saving_rationale: Combines find with exclusions in one command, reducing failed attempts and output noise.
